name: @snowluma/sqlite
description: SnowLuma SQLite wrapper. Exposes the `better-sqlite3` Database constructor + Statement type, but loads the native `.node` binding from `dist/native/sqlite/<platform>-<arch>/` at runtime instead of going through `bindings('better_sqlite3.node')` + `node_modules/.../build/Release/`. The vendored prebuilds under `packages/runtime/native/sqlite/` get copied into the dist tree by `vite-plugin-cp` during the @snowluma/core build, mirroring how `websocket-*.node` and `ffmpegAddon.*.node` are handled. The end result: production artifacts ship as a single self-contained dist/ directory with no `dist/node_modules/` and no install step at runtime.
